description_long: This object consists of four wooden storage crates arranged in a compact, interlocking cluster. Each crate is constructed from rough, weathered wooden planks, reinforced at the corners with visible metal fasteners. The wood grain and texture are prominent, giving the crates a rustic, utilitarian appearance suitable for outdoor or industrial urban environments. The crates are box-shaped, with slatted sides and tops, and no visible handles, locks, or openings. The coloration is a natural, muted brown with some variation in tone due to the wood's texture. The overall structure appears sturdy and capable of supporting weight, making it ideal for storage or as a makeshift platform.
description: A group of four weathered wooden storage crates with visible wood grain and metal corner fasteners, arranged in a compact cluster. The crates have a rustic, sturdy appearance and are suitable for urban or industrial settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing two crates stacked vertically with two more crates flanking the lower crate, highlighting the slatted wood texture and metal corner fasteners.
description_view_1: Angled view revealing the tops and sides of the crates, emphasizing the interlocking arrangement and the vertical slats on the visible surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the crates, with the same slatted wood construction and a clear view of the three lower crates supporting the top crate.
description_view_3: Side view showing the staggered stacking of the crates, with the tops and sides visible and the wood grain detail prominent.
